content:
💡 REAL-Video-Enhancer | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enhancing the quality and resolution of video content through AI-powered interpolation, upscaling, decompression, and denoising, accessible via a user-friendly interface on multiple operating systems.
✨ Key Features: • Video interpolation and upscaling • Decompression and denoising • Cross-platform support (Windows, Linux, macOS)
📖 Summary: REAL Video Enhancer is a Python-based application designed to improve video quality by interpolating frames, upscaling resolution, decompressing, and denoising content. It supports Windows, Linux, and macOS, offering a user-friendly GUI and leveraging advanced AI models and backends like TensorRT and NCNN for efficient processing.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
